narrative:
Centerville Pct (precinct in Gallia County) has 633 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.3 percentage points.
